title: pedicularis gracilis subsp. gracilis
intro: Pedicularis gracilis subsp. gracilis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bumblebee orchid family, native to the alpine and subalpine zones of the Himalayas. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit platelet aggregation and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Pedicularis gracilis subsp. gracilis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including cardiovascular disease and cancer.
